executive_summary: The review identified several process deviations related to approvals, vendor communications, and documentation completeness. The available evidence supports a need for stronger review controls and clearer ownership of remediation actions.

findings.title: Approval documentation was incomplete
findings.description: Several reviewed transactions lacked clear evidence of approval before processing.

findings.title: Vendor communication was not centralized
findings.description: Relevant communication was split across multiple channels, increasing review complexity.

findings.title: Ownership of follow-up actions was unclear
findings.description: Remediation responsibilities were not consistently assigned after issues were identified.

recommendations.action: Centralize approval evidence for reviewed transactions
Create a standard case file structure for future reviews
Assign remediation owners and target dates

next_steps: Validate remediation ownership with department leads.
Standardize evidence collection folders for future reviews.
Schedule follow-up review after corrective actions are completed.
